profile.name: Anil Jadhav
profile.role: Founder, AniverShree | Full Stack Developer (Angular + Spring Boot)
profile.bio: Founder of AniverShree and a passionate developer building scalable web applications and intelligent systems. Experienced in Angular, Spring Boot, and AI-powered applications, I enjoy solving real-world problems and creating user-friendly digital experiences through products delivered by my company.

projects.name: AI Family Tree Generator
projects.description: An intelligent genealogy platform that transforms family data into dynamic relationship maps. Includes smart profile linking, media uploads, and AI-assisted ancestry insights.

projects.name: Online Bookstore Platform
projects.description: A full-stack commerce experience for browsing, purchasing, and managing books online. Features admin inventory tools, secure checkout, and personalized recommendations.

projects.name: Smart Delivery Tracker
projects.description: A logistics dashboard for real-time parcel visibility with route summaries and delivery milestones. Built for teams that need actionable data and clear shipment timelines.

projects.name: Personal Finance Dashboard
projects.description: A budgeting and analytics tool that helps users track spending, savings, and recurring bills. Offers visual insights, smart alerts, and mobile-friendly reporting.

projects.name: AI Video Generator Tool
projects.description: A creative automation platform for generating short-form videos from prompts and scripts. Includes asset sequencing, AI-powered voice generation, and export workflows.

projects.name: Portfolio Builder App
projects.description: A guided web app for building beautiful portfolio sites with configurable templates and live previews. Designed for developers, designers, and freelancers.

projects.name: Healthcare Appointment Hub
projects.description: A patient-first scheduling portal that streamlines doctor bookings, notifications, and record visibility. Focused on clean UX and secure healthcare workflows.

projects.name: Recruitment Intelligence Suite
projects.description: A hiring operations tool that assists recruiters with candidate tracking, scoring, and interview coordination. Adds AI summaries to improve screening speed and consistency.

apps.name: TaskPilot
apps.description: A productivity app for tracking routines, tasks, and deadlines with a clean dashboard and notification support.

apps.name: HealthSync
apps.description: A wellness companion app for monitoring daily habits, water intake, and personalized activity goals.

apps.name: ShopFlow Admin
apps.description: An operations dashboard for catalog control, order fulfillment, and sales reporting in modern retail teams.

timeline.title: Started Web Development
timeline.description: Built foundational frontend skills and started creating responsive interfaces with modern web technologies.

timeline.title: Built Full Stack Projects
timeline.description: Expanded into backend development, APIs, and database design while delivering end-to-end applications.

timeline.title: Integrated AI into Applications
timeline.description: Added AI-driven features to real-world products, focusing on automation, insights, and better user experiences.
